title: T-007 — Drizzle migration: allergen_changeover_validations + retention CHECK + RLS
prompt:
# T-007 — Drizzle migration: allergen_changeover_validations

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.8, §16.4 V-PROD-08/09, §5.3 BRCGS

## Goal
Create allergen_changeover_validations per §9.8 with V-PROD-09 retention_until = validated_at + 7y enforced via CHECK or trigger, V-PROD-08 signatures>=2 for risk>=medium, RLS.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/allergen-changeover-validations.ts: PK id UUID, tenant_id, changeover_event_id REFERENCES changeover_events, validation_result text NOT NULL, risk_level text NOT NULL, cleaning_evidence JSONB NOT NULL, atp_evidence JSONB, signatures JSONB NOT NULL, override_by, override_reason, validated_at NOT NULL default now, retention_until DATE NOT NULL. Add BEFORE INSERT/UPDATE trigger fn_set_allergen_retention_until that sets retention_until = validated_at + INTERVAL '7 years' (V-PROD-09). Add CHECK constraint chk_allergen_signatures (jsonb_array_length(signatures) >= 2 OR risk_level NOT IN ('medium','high','segregated')) per V-PROD-08. Indexes idx_allergen_val_changeover, idx_allergen_val_retention. RLS by tenant_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/allergen-changeover-validations.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_allergen_changeover_validations.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/allergen-changeover-validations-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given INSERT without retention_until, when row queried, then retention_until = validated_at + 7y (V-PROD-09 trigger)
2. Given INSERT risk_level='high' with signatures=[1 item], when run, then chk_allergen_signatures rejects (V-PROD-08)
3. Given INSERT risk_level='low' with signatures=[1 item], when run, then accepted (low risk does not require dual sign-off)

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting trigger and CHECK present before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test allergen-changeover-validations-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow override of retention_until below 7y (BRCGS Issue 10 §5.3#1)
- Do not skip dual-signature enforcement for risk>=medium (V-PROD-08)
- Do not skip RLS

pipeline_inputs.description: allergen_changeover_validations table with 7y retention trigger, dual-signature CHECK, RLS — BRCGS Issue 10.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per §9.8 SQL. Add BEFORE INSERT trigger fn_set_allergen_retention_until enforcing retention_until = validated_at + INTERVAL '7 years' (V-PROD-09). Add CHECK chk_allergen_signatures using jsonb_array_length(signatures) >= 2 OR risk_level NOT IN ('medium','high','segregated') for V-PROD-08. RLS by tenant_id. BRCGS Issue 10 7-year audit retention non-negotiable.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen gate DSL rule (separate task)
